title: v1.0.67 Update
description: Welcome to AcademicPulse v1.0.67! This release delivers a cleaner Question Bank UI, smarter source filtering, and key rendering performance improvements.
features:
🧹 Cleaner Question Bank Cards
Ref Text Removed: The verbose [Kaplan] Ref: Q2, Q51... reference lines have been removed from card bodies. Source bank information is now displayed exclusively as compact, colour-coded badges in the card header — keeping your bank clean and readable.

Auto-Placeholder Suppression: Cards created purely from a question reference number (with no custom text) no longer display auto-generated filler text in the question or answer area. The card displays cleanly with just the topic, date, section, and source badges.

🐛 Source Filter Bug Fix
Mixed Card Visibility: Filtering the question bank by a specific source (e.g., Kaplan or BPP) now correctly surfaces merged topic cards that contain references from that source. Previously, merged cross-bank cards were completely invisible when using the source filter.

⚡ Rendering Performance Optimisation
O(1) Card Indexing: The card list renderer previously used a linear indexOf scan inside every iteration to compute the global question number — making it O(n²) for large banks. This has been replaced with a pre-built Map lookup, making card numbering instant regardless of bank size.
